productDisplayName: Puma Men Complete Itana 2 Grey Sports Shoes
description: Get used to maximum comfort and performance during your run with these Complete Itana shoes from puma. Equipped with patented M2D Technology for added stability, these shoes work as hard as you to help you run longer and stronger.UpperSandwich mesh material for a high degree of breathability, lowering the risk of blisteringReflective elements to allow secure running in low light conditionsSynthetic overlays in formstripe and cat logo design for secure Fit and styleLace-ups for snug fitCushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortMidsoleIdCELL, a low-density cushioning unit to improve shock absorption and protect the feetKMS Lite midsole that provides better cushioning and reduces weightOutsoleArchTec guides the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-offDecoupled Heel Construction to distribute impact, allowing for a softer motionduoCELL, a long-lasting CELL unit in heel for improved shock absorptionEverRide, a blown rubber outsole reducing weight and improving forefoot cushioningEverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole to provide durability in high-wear areasM2D, a second density on the medial side to stabilize the foot during the stance phaseshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
